title: BEM-633 final acceptance
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def exists(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size>0

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}

required={
 'role_communication_canon':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md',
 'auditor_interaction_canon':'governance/protocols/INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_AUDITOR_INTERACTION_CANON.md',
 'role_execution_evidence_canon':'governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md',
 'architecture_lint_script':'scripts/internal_contour_architecture_lint.py',
 'architecture_lint_workflow':'.github/workflows/internal-contour-architecture-lint.yml',
 'architecture_lint_state':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json',
 'bem605_internal_auditor_package':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem625_bem605_hourly_report_internal_auditor_review.json',
 'mailbox_misroute_annotation':'governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json',
 'auditor_to_auditor_lane':'governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor/bem625_external_auditor_sync_placeholder.md',
 'legacy_mailbox_annotation':'governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem628_legacy_mailbox_lanes_annotation.json',
 'provider_route_closure_policy':'governance/protocols/PROVIDER_ROUTE_CLOSURE_POLICY.md',
 'provider_route_closure_state':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json',
 'runtime_smoke_script':'scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py',
 'delivery_verifier_script':'scripts/verify_curator_hourly_delivery.py',
 'final_calibration_report':'governance/reports/bem628_final_internal_contour_calibration_report.md',
 'deep_audit_report':'governance/reports/bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report.md'
}
checks=[]
for k,v in required.items():
    checks.append({'name':k,'pass':exists(v),'evidence':v})

lint=load('governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json')
closure=load('governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json')
route=load('governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json')
checks.append({'name':'lint_status_pass','pass':lint.get('status')=='pass','evidence':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json'})
checks.append({'name':'architecture_closed','pass':closure.get('architecture_closed') is True,'evidence':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json'})
checks.append({'name':'provider_route_valid','pass':closure.get('provider_status') in ['primary_proven','reserve_validated_primary_unavailable'],'evidence':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json'})
checks.append({'name':'mailbox_not_internal_role_bus','pass':exists('governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json') and exists('governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'),'evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'})
checks.append({'name':'deno_transport_not_executor_documented','pass':'Deno является внешним транспортным адаптером' in Path('governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md').read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'})
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='accepted' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'FINAL_ACCEPTANCE_FAILED','failed':failed}
operational_watch=closure.get('operational_watch')

final={'schema_version':'final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.v1','bem':'BEM-633','status':status,'checks':checks,'selected_provider':route.get('selected_provider'),'reserve_used':route.get('reserve_used'),'architecture_closed':closure.get('architecture_closed'),'operational_delivery_closed':closure.get('operational_delivery_closed'),'operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:33 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(final,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

md=[]
md.append('# BEM-633 | Final Acceptance | Internal Contour And Auditor Sync')
md.append('')
md.append('Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:33 (UTC+3)')
md.append('')
md.append('## Verdict')
md.append('Status: '+status)
md.append('Architecture closed: '+str(closure.get('architecture_closed')))
md.append('Provider status: '+str(closure.get('provider_status')))
md.append('Selected provider: '+str(route.get('selected_provider')))
md.append('Reserve used: '+str(route.get('reserve_used')))
md.append('Operational delivery status: '+str(closure.get('delivery_status')))
md.append('')
md.append('## What was fixed')
md.append('- Internal roles now use internal role-bus, not audit_mailbox.')
md.append('- audit_mailbox is reserved for Internal Auditor ↔ External Auditor only.')
md.append('- BEM-605 misroute was annotated and superseded by internal auditor inbox package.')
md.append('- Role execution evidence canon separates artifact_only, gpt_reserve_execution, claude_primary_execution, and codex_direct_execution.')
md.append('- Provider route closure policy accepts honest reserve fallback when primary is not proven.')
md.append('- Architecture lint is installed and initial lint state is PASS.')
md.append('- Deno is documented as external transport adapter, not internal Executor role.')
md.append('')
md.append('## Acceptance checks')
for x in checks:
    md.append('- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL')+' | '+x['evidence'])
md.append('')
md.append('## Operational watch')
md.append('null' if operational_watch is None else json.dumps(operational_watch,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))
md.append('')
md.append('## Blocker')
md.append('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))
report=reports/'bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(md)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync','cycle_id':'bem633-final-acceptance-internal-contour-and-auditor-sync','source':'gpt_final_acceptance','status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'architecture_closed':closure.get('architecture_closed'),'selected_provider':route.get('selected_provider'),'reserve_used':route.get('reserve_used'),'blocker':blocker,'operational_watch':operational_watch,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:33 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'architecture_closed':closure.get('architecture_closed'),'selected_provider':route.get('selected_provider'),'reserve_used':route.get('reserve_used'),'blocker':blocker,'operational_watch':operational_watch}
contour_state['internal_contour_calibration_final_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:33 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-633 '+status.upper()+': final acceptance completed. architecture_closed='+str(closure.get('architecture_closed'))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Ran final acceptance for internal contour and auditor sync calibration')
"""
No issue comments.
